target: 6. Time Capsule Memo

My stomach's full now,
I'll go look for the memo in the room.
Everyone wait here.

Shouldn't I help too?
It would be faster if we search together.
Then I'll help too.

No, I'll do it alone.
Everyone relax.

Why are you refusing?
You should let Mio help.

Sister, I think no one else has seen
the room yet.
It's really messy.
That guy…

Kaori, are you okay?
You seem uneasy.

Ah, sorry.
Um…

I'm not used to visiting someone's house…
I don't know what to do…

Don't worry about it.
It's not a fancy room,
just relax.
U-uh…

(That's really Kaori.
I'm starting to remember things from long ago…)
What's with you, Shinpei? You're smiling.

Eh…?
Was I smiling?
You were! And you were looking at Kaori too.
Eh… uh, um…

Ah, heh heh… sorry.
I was just remembering the young Kaori.

It's embarrassing…
She was a quiet, plain girl.

Now she's a popular idol.
I really admire that.
But why did you become an idol, Kaori?

U-uh… well…
I felt I needed to change myself.

Actually, I was very introverted…
That hasn't changed.
Is that right?

I've always had a complex about it.
So when I transferred schools, I wanted to change…

I still can't do a lot of things well,
but I feel like I'm slowly changing.

Heh, even now, before a concert,
my stomach gets upset sometimes.

Huh, really?
So being an idol is tough, huh?

It's tough, but there's also meaning in it.
When people say they got energy from me,
I feel really happy.

Even though I used to always be the one receiving energy,
I can now make people smile.

At those times,
I feel like becoming an idol was worth it.

I'll keep doing my best as an idol.
Please support me.
Of course.

Ah, if possible…
Shinpei too.
Of course I'll support you.
Thank you.
Hmm…

Oh, Kaori, do you remember Shinpei?
Do you have any memories?
Memories with Shinpei?

Like things you did together,
or things you talked about.
I just had a brief conversation when I borrowed a book.
Shinpei, you didn't ask!
Why are you glaring at me!?
Memories… um…

I said I always read books in the library, right?
Shinpei also came there often.
Shinpei's always read weird books.
Weird books…?

Shinpei read a lot of sci-fi.
It was complicated books,
and I thought it was amazing for someone our age.
S-so that's what it was…

One time, I was struggling with a puzzle book,
and Shinpei came over and talked to me…

As we worked on it together,
I got more into it than she did.
He said, "Let's solve that book too!"

We spent the whole day
solving puzzles and riddles in the library.
Oh, that happened?

Heh, yeah.
Then Sensei found us…

We got scolded and then she walked me home.
Do you remember?

Ah, that day!
I remember going home with Kaori.
That's what happened, huh?

You always help people in trouble.
That's always been your thing.
Well… maybe I was being overbearing.

That's not true.
The way Shinpei taught me
changed how I think…

It felt like my perspective broadened.
After that day, I started seeing myself more objectively.

Shinpei's specialty, the 'bird's-eye view'!
Wow, Kaori, you're amazing.
I still can't do it at all.
Mio's too easily distracted.
Huh, is that true?

It's like you got more into the puzzle
than the person solving it.
That's so like Shinpei.
Heh, really…
Everyone, hold on a second.
What's wrong?
Did you find the time capsule memo?
Yeah, I found something that looks like it!
Really!?
What's this "something that looks like it"?

You should see it for yourself.
Here, this is it…
…What's this?
That's what I meant by "something that looks like it."
So this is what you meant by "something that looks like it"?

Is this really it?
It looks more like a map than a memo.
…Or maybe it's a cipher?

If it's a cipher, Shinpei would be good at it.
Do you understand it?

Think calmly.
It was drawn by Ushio.
Do you think Ushio could draw a cipher?
Ow!

Shinpei!
Don't say things like that or I'll hit you!
Don't hit me first!
What is this thing?
Hmm, the one on the left looks like a tree, right?
Yeah, probably.
Probably? You drew it, right?
Did I say something?
N-nothing!

There are several trees…
One of them has a line coming out.

This one is a cat… right?
Heh, it's cute.
Yeah~?
(Is this cute?)

Shinpei.
You got something to say?
I didn't say anything!

Um, the cat seems to be connected
with lines too…

What's that round thing
connected to those lines?
Don't you know, sister?

Um… what is this?
Shinpei, can you decode it?

You drew it.
How can you not know what it says?
It's been so long since I drew it.
Hey, isn't this a pebble?
Why do you think that?

I can't explain it well,
but I think a pebble would look like this.
…You're a real sister.
So if this is a pebble…

Trees, black cat, and pebbles are connected by lines,
and the thing in the center of that triangle…
Is this… a seashell?
Ah…

A seashell…?
Does it have something to do
with the time capsule?
Mio, what do you think as a sister?

What can I say?
Sister sometimes has weird ideas.
That's true…
Ow! Why did you hit me!
Because you mocked her!
You said it, Mio!

Hit the cute little sister?
You're a terrible person!
Would you rather me?!

Shinpei's used to it.
He's always getting hit.
…Ah, that's right.
Shin-chan, don't you think it's not okay to just accept that?
Hehe, Ajiro-kun and Mio really are close, aren't they?
Yeah, nothing's changed since before.

So, what do we do?
Let's try looking for a tree, a cat, or a rock?
This is going to be a huge task…
The island has forests and mountains everywhere, and rocks and cats can move, you know.
But why is the time capsule's location a shell?
Usually, it's an X mark or something.
Well…it's probably okay.
So, let's not worry about the small details anymore.
Anyway, we found the clue! Now it's all about taking action!
That's why I'm saying I don't know where to go!
First, take action! Just go around the island's suspicious places randomly, right?
Wandering around randomly won't do anything, will it?
Shinpei's overthinking. It's because he reads too many complicated books.
You don't think enough!
Not again… You two fight too much.
They're close, huh? Was it always like this?
Yeah, it's always been like this. Nothing's changed from two years ago.
I really wish you'd stop…
Let's go already! Mio and Kaori, don't leave us behind!
Ugh… Mio and Kaori, is that okay with you?
Yeah! Let's go, Kaori.
Yeah… Let's go.
